title: Generate JSON Data for a University Course Catalog
scenario: Create a prompt that generates JSON data for a university course catalog that includes courses with descriptions, prerequisites, and credit hours. The JSON output should be under 1000 characters and include at least 5 courses with their respective descriptions, prerequisites, and credit hours.
constraints: Use a consistent naming convention for courses and prerequisites

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON meets the character limit and uses a consistent naming convention.
Verify the accuracy and validity of the generated course data, including descriptions, prerequisites, and credit hours.
Check if the generated JSON includes at least 5 courses with their respective descriptions, prerequisites, and credit hours.
Evaluate the readability of the generated JSON, ensuring it is well-formatted and easy to understand.
